import pandas as pd
ch = pd.read_parquet\(''output/time_series_characteristics.parquet''\)
print\(''Columns:'', ch.columns.tolist\(\)\)
print\(''Shape:'', ch.shape\)
print\(\)
# Check for NaN issues
print\(''NaN counts:''\)
for col in [''unique_id'', ''n_observations'', ''date_range_start'', ''date_range_end'', ''mean'', ''is_intermittent'', ''has_seasonality'', ''has_trend'', ''complexity_level'']:
    if col in ch.columns:
        print\(f''  {col}: {ch[col].isna\(\).sum\(\)}''\)
    else:
        print\(f''  {col}: MISSING COLUMN''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\BrunoZindy\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_qbz5n2kfra8p0\\python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
mt = pd.read_parquet\(''output/backtest_metrics.parquet''\)
# Find a series with all 5 methods
counts = mt.groupby\(''unique_id''\)[''method''].nunique\(\)
full = counts[counts == 5].index[:3].tolist\(\)
print\(''Series with all 5 methods:'', full\)
for uid in full[:1]:
    sub = mt[mt[''unique_id''] == uid]
    print\(f''\\n{uid}:''\)
    for method in sub[''method''].unique\(\):
        m = sub[sub[''method''] == method]
        print\(f''  {method}: MAE={m[""mae""].mean\(\):.1f}, RMSE={m[""rmse""].mean\(\):.1f}, Bias={m[""bias""].mean\(\):.1f}, Coverage90={m[""coverage_90""].mean\(\):.3f}''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\BrunoZindy\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_qbz5n2kfra8p0\\python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
mt = pd.read_parquet\(''output/backtest_metrics.parquet''\)
counts = mt.groupby\(''unique_id''\)[''method''].nunique\(\)
print\(''Methods per series distribution:''\)
print\(counts.value_counts\(\).sort_index\(\)\)
# Show series with max methods
maxn = counts.max\(\)
sample = counts[counts == maxn].index[:3].tolist\(\)
print\(f''\\nSeries with {maxn} methods:'', sample\)
for uid in sample[:1]:
    sub = mt[mt[''unique_id''] == uid]
    print\(f''\\n{uid} methods: {sub[""method""].unique\(\).tolist\(\)}''\)
    for method in sub[''method''].unique\(\):
        m = sub[sub[''method''] == method]
        print\(f''  {method}: windows={len\(m\)}, MAE={m[""mae""].mean\(\):.1f}, RMSE={m[""rmse""].mean\(\):.1f}''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\BrunoZindy\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_qbz5n2kfra8p0\\python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

fc = pd.read_parquet\(''output/forecasts_all_methods.parquet''\)

# Check for any non-standard quantile types
for i, row in fc.head\(20\).iterrows\(\):
    q = row[''quantiles'']
    pf = row[''point_forecast'']
    if not isinstance\(q, dict\):
        print\(f''Row {i}: quantiles is {type\(q\)}, not dict''\)
    if not isinstance\(pf, np.ndarray\):
        print\(f''Row {i}: point_forecast is {type\(pf\)}, not ndarray''\)
    # Check for NaN in point_forecast
    if np.any\(np.isnan\(pf\)\):
        print\(f''Row {i} \({row[""unique_id""]}\): has NaN in point_forecast''\)

# Check for NaN forecasts globally
nan_count = 0
for i, row in fc.iterrows\(\):
    pf = row[''point_forecast'']
    if isinstance\(pf, np.ndarray\) and np.any\(np.isnan\(pf\)\):
        nan_count += 1
        if nan_count <= 3:
            print\(f''NaN forecast: {row[""unique_id""]} / {row[""method""]}''\)

print\(f''Total forecasts with NaN: {nan_count} out of {len\(fc\)}''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\BrunoZindy\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_qbz5n2kfra8p0\\python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
fc = pd.read_parquet\(''output/forecasts_all_methods.parquet''\)
print\(f''Total forecasts: {len\(fc\)}''\)
print\(f''Methods: {fc[""method""].value_counts\(\).to_dict\(\)}''\)
# Check horizon length
lengths = fc[''point_forecast''].apply\(len\)
print\(f''Forecast horizons: min={lengths.min\(\)}, max={lengths.max\(\)}, mean={lengths.mean\(\):.1f}''\)
print\(f''Sample: {fc.iloc[0][""unique_id""]} / {fc.iloc[0][""method""]} has {len\(fc.iloc[0][""point_forecast""]\)} periods''\)
")
